summary: Hand-built signed mtop client + search/find/sync + 7 transcendence commands; the generated stub sync was replaced and offers is store-backed.
reason: 1688's offer search is an md5-signed mtop request the generated HTTP client cannot produce, so the data layer and commands are hand-authored around internal/mtop.
validated_outcome: shipcheck 6/6 green; 40/40 full live dogfood against h5api.m.1688.com
